content.full_text:
Re:
Fern Por-rrrcAt- Pnecrrces CoMMrssroN
-128 J Street o Suire 620 r Sacramento, CA 95g14-2329
(916) 312-5660 o Fax (916) 322-0886
April28,2009
Christine L. Fouts
Calaveras County Elections Coordinator
891 Mountain Ranch Road
San Andreas, CA 95249
Your Request for Advice
Our File No. .4-09-101
Dear Ms. McHugh:
This letter is in response to your request on behalf of Calaveras Countv for advice
regarding the campaign provisions of the political Reform Act (the ..Act"1. t "
QUESTION
May committees involved in the Calaveras County ballot measure election to be
held on August 25,2009, combine the semi-annual statement with the first pre-election
statement due on July 16, 2009?
CONCLUSION
In connection with an August 25,2009 election, committees may use a filing
schedule that combines the semi-annual campaign statement with the fiist pre-election
statement due on July 16, 2009.
I The Political Refrlrm Act is contained in Government Code Sections til000 through 91014. All
statutory references are to the Government Code. unless otherwise indicated. The regulatioris of tne Fair
Political Practices Commissitln are contained in Sections I 8 I l0 through I tt997 of Tiile 2 of the Calitbrnia
Code of Regulations. All regulatory ret'erences are to Title 2. Division 6 of the Califirrnia Code of
Regulations. unless otherwise indicated.


File No. A-09-101
Page No. 2
AIIALYSIS
During an election, candidates and committees involved in the election are
required to file two campaign statements disclosing contributions received and
expenditures made in connection with that election. These pre-election campaign
statements are generally filed 40 days before the election and again 12 days before the
election. (Section 84200.8.) Semi-annual statements are filed January 31 and July 31,
respectively. (Section 84200.)
There is a mechanism in the Act that permits the combining of statements when
an overlapping reporting period occurs, or the filing of the semi-annual statement would
be an additional, unnecessary filing to the two pre-election statements. (Section 84205.)
In this case, filing the two pre-election statements in connection with an August 25, ZOO},
election will satisfy the semi-annual filing requirement.
A campaign statement filing schedule which outlines the due dates for filing
statements in connection with the election is enclosed for your convenience.
If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me
at (916) 322-s66O.
Sincerely,
Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel
